title: AWS CloudFormation Parameters
summary: AWS CloudFormation templates can have parameters which can be filled in at the time the CloudFormation template is deployed, making it possible to use the same AWS CloudFormation template to create different (but similar) stacks.
content:
AWS CloudFormation templates can have parameters which can be filled in at the time the CloudFormation template is deployed,
                making it possible to use the same AWS CloudFormation template to create different (but similar) stacks.
